name: encounter-timeline-panel
title: Encounter Timeline Panel
description: A patient's encounter history on a vertical timeline rail — the marker's color and icon encode the encounter type (with a Tooltip). Composes WidgetPanel + Timeline + TimelineItem.

props.name: items
props.description: Encounters newest-first: { type, title, meta, date, summary, onClick }.

clinicalNotes: Pass encounters newest-first so the latest contact reads at the top — the way a clinician scans a history. Marker color + icon encode care setting (ED=destructive, lab/immunization=success, procedure=warning) using the same taxonomy as EncounterItem, so a chart's list view and timeline view stay consistent. Each marker's type is disclosed via Tooltip, never color alone.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Patient Chart block (B-1).
